repos.name: climate-dashboard
repos.description: Interactive global temperature dashboard using ERA5 data with ML-powered projections

repos.name: us-hot-days
repos.description: US hot days: raw GHCN-Daily vs homogenized Berkeley Earth analysis behind the Climate Brink post 'Hot days and cold biases'

repos.name: canada-wildfires-climate
repos.description: Canadian wildfires in climate context: area burned, fire-season warming, and the 2026 smoke event — reproducible analysis behind The Climate Brink post

repos.name: co2-storage-map
repos.description: Interactive global atlas of CO2 storage potential: geologic injection basins + in-situ mineralization formations

repos.name: naam-solar-scorecard
repos.description: How Ramez Naam's 2020 solar cost predictions held up against actual 2020-2025 data

repos.name: global-temperature-explainer
repos.description: Interactive explainer: how thousands of thermometers become one global temperature record — answering the claim that global temperature is 'physically meaningless'. Built from raw GHCN-M v4 data.
